name: Gergel Ebanex bring-up test (export-root-drop repro vs controls, through native OSF scene flow)
_comment: Diagnostic pack for the SAF furniture fly-away. Each scene declares two explicit gender-agnostic roles so positional binding (player->role0, npc->role1) never trips the gender filter (without this, omitted roles bound a gendered slot and OSF refused the start with 'actor 0 fails role filters'). LATENT BUG (verified by decode, separate from the scene-path fly-up): GLTFImport.cpp IsExportRootNode zeroes the Root/HumanExportRoot TRANSLATION; SAF/NAF MOUNTED-furniture clips bake 170-250u of gross placement into Root, so dropping it parks the body that far off HORIZONTALLY. Root=0 clips (Floor, AkBunkBed, AkCouch) are unaffected by THAT. REPRO scenes use Root-baked clips (BunkBed ~197u, ShipLadder ~253u); CONTROL scenes use Root=0 clips. Clips load via the same Data-relative 'SAF\Animations\...' path / same GLTFImport the SAF shim uses. All scenes are FREE: OSFTest.PairId co-locates at player; OSFTest.FurnitureId anchors at a furniture ref; OSFTest.Furniture2 uses two NPCs + free camera (removes the player-controller variable). loops:0 = hold forever. Gergel's quest drives the SOLO path (PlayAnimation -> OSF.Play); most faithful one-actor repro: cgf "OSFTest.Solo" "SAF\Animations\GE\ShL\Blowjob02-ShipLadder-1.glb"

scenes.name: CONTROL: SAF_Surrender test.glb (known-good baseline) on both actors -- should look correct
REPRO: Gergel Blowjob02 @ ShipLadder (Root ~253u dropped) -- should fly away
REPRO: Gergel Blowjob09 @ BunkBed Bb1 (Root ~197u dropped) -- should fly away
CONTROL: Gergel Blowjob09 @ AkBunkBed ABB (Root=0) -- should NOT fly from root-drop
CONTROL: Gergel Blowjob01 @ Floor (Root=0) -- baseline, should look fine
